subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou dost verily hear the lamentations of Thy chosen onesand the cries that they have uttered in their separation from Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تسمع حنین اصفیائک و ضجیجهم فی فراقک و صریخهم بما ورد علیهم من
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
